sources.python_server: Verified patterns from existing AutoTally Python server
sources.web_verified: Found in real user posts/screenshots online
sources.training_data: From training knowledge of Indian bank SMS formats - NEEDS VERIFICATION

notes: Only 4 HDFC templates are verified from the Python server. All others need real-device testing.
Banks frequently update SMS formats. These patterns should be validated against actual SMS on your phone.
Some banks have multiple sender IDs for different services (transactional, promotional, etc.).
Date formats vary: dd-mm-yy, dd/mm/yy, dd-MMM-yy, dd MMM YYYY
Amount formats vary: Rs.499.00, Rs 499.00, INR 499.00, Rs.499
Balance portion after 'Avl Bal' is intentionally excluded from patterns as it's not needed for transaction parsing
